name: GOLFTEC Tacoma
address: 3815 S Steele St Suite H, Tacoma, WA 98409
about: GOLFTEC Tacoma provides golf instruction using advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors to analyze swings. The facility offers private lessons, club fitting services, and practice memberships with access to training bays equipped with video feedback systems. GOLFTEC focuses on data-driven coaching to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game through personalized lesson plans and strategic guidance from certified PGA professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized lesson plans from certified PGA coaches
Club fitting services with launch monitors and shaft optimization
Practice memberships providing access to training bays
Pro shop discounts on golf equipment

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor technology used for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you can bring your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned, though policies may vary by location.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: Time for simulator rounds isn't specified, but sessions are typically structured around lesson or fitting times.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for families and youth golfers.
